title: Discovery Parks - Byron Bay
description: Relaxed accommodations in a vibrant resort featuring a cafe, a water park & barbecues.
address: 1/399 Ewingsdale Rd, Byron Bay NSW 2481, Australia
hotelDescription:
Set on landscaped grounds, this lively resort is 2 km from the serene Belongil Beach, and 6 km from bay views and maritime exhibits at Cape Byron Lighthouse.
 Relaxed accommodations range from permanent tents to modern lakeside wood cabins, and feature kitchenettes, terraces or porches, and living areas. All provide free Wi-Fi and flat-screen TVs. Some have barbecue grills and/or bunk beds. Bathrooms are shared or en suite.
 Amenities include a cafe, a water park, an outdoor pool and BBQ areas, as well as a tennis court and coin-operated laundry facilities. There are also campsites.

title: Glen Villa Resort
description: Laid-back resort offering streamlined cabins, plus an outdoor pool and a picnic area.
address: 80/86 Butler St, Byron Bay NSW 2481, Australia
hotelDescription:
Adjacent to the Cumbedin Swamp Nature Reserve, this laid-back resort is a 5-minute walk from the Byron Bay Markets and 1.8 km from Belongil Beach.
 The straightforward, air-conditioned cabins provide kitchenettes with microwaves, plus flat-screen TVs, en suite bathrooms and patios. Wi-Fi is available (fee). Some cabins add whirlpool baths or full kitchens. Powered caravan sites are also available.
 There's an outdoor saltwater pool and hot tub. Other amenities include a shaded picnic area with BBQs, plus a guest kitchen and coin-operated laundry facilities.
